examples: The Cherry Orchard is a new type of Chekhovian modern comedy.
As a family we are melancholy enough without the Chekhovian stage lighting.
Vasily Kachalov was a Moscow art Theatre actor who played Chekhovian parts.
In this, his most Chekhovian of pieces, Sondheim shoves our own mortality down our throats.
Cromer successfully creates a Chekhovian atmosphere with Nelson's script, with some characters reminiscing out loud while others experience quiet, sometimes rueful epiphanies.
